segments.text: As digital transformation accelerates, APRI Armenia views Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) as a tool to enhance productivity and research depth while remaining steadfast in its commitment to critical thinking, accuracy, and intellectual integrity.

segments.B_label: purpose/rationale (why a guideline)/document status
segments.text: This statement outlines the principles that govern how APRI Armenia integrates GenAI into its research, communications, and daily operations.

segments.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use
segments.text: APRI Armenia’s approach is guided by the ALLEA European Code of Conduct for Research Integrity and is centered on four pillars:

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: APRI Armenia forbids extensive or significant usage of GenAI in its external outreach, communication or research outputs.

segments.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use
segments.text: Human Agency & Oversight:

segments.B_label: roles/accountability/oversight
segments.text: GenAI is a collaborator, not a researcher or designated communicator. Every piece of work published by APRI Armenia is the result of human critical thinking, analysis, and final decision-making.

segments.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use
segments.text: Transparency:

segments.B_label: required safeguards/procedures for AI
segments.text: APRI Armenia believes in honest communication. In limited cases, when GenAI is used to shape the research process, external communication or drafting of a public output, APRI Armenia provides appropriate disclosure to its readers.

segments.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use
segments.text: Data Sovereignty & Privacy:

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: APRI Armenia does not input confidential information, unpublished research, or private donor information into public GenAI models.

segments.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use
segments.text: Contextual Integrity:

segments.B_label: risks/limitations/concerns
segments.text: APRI Armenia’s strength lies in its deep understanding of Armenia and the region. APRI Armenia guards against “AI-heavy” writing that lacks local nuance, ensuring well-grounded and fact-based analysis and insights.

segments.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI
segments.text: APRI Armenia may utilize GenAI to augment their capabilities, specifically for:

segments.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI
segments.text: - Synthesizing vast amounts of public information and emerging trends.

segments.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI
segments.text: - Brainstorming diverse hypotheses and assumptions.

segments.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI
segments.text: - Improving the clarity and accessibility of complex documents.

segments.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI
segments.text: - Automating administrative and organizational workflows.

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: APRI Armenia does not permit:

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: - The use of AI-generated content as a substitute for original communication, research or expert analysis.

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: - The inclusion of AI-generated citations or data without independent human verification.

segments.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI
segments.text: - The attribution of authorship to GenAI; responsibility for all work lies solely with the named human authors.

segments.B_label: purpose/rationale (why a guideline)/document status
segments.text: Transparency is essential to maintaining trust. APRI Armenia adopts a tiered approach to disclosure:

segments.B_label: required safeguards/procedures for AI
segments.text: Full Disclosure:

segments.B_label: required safeguards/procedures for AI
segments.text: If a report, online publication, or printed document has been assisted by GenAI, a clear statement will be included (e.g., in the methodology, footnotes, or article preamble).

segments.B_label: required safeguards/procedures for AI
segments.text: Internal Assistance:

segments.B_label: required safeguards/procedures for AI
segments.text: Minor uses, such as grammar correction or translation of public news articles, are considered part of standard professional tools and do not require external disclosure.

segments.B_label: monitoring/revision/updating
segments.text: The landscape of Artificial Intelligence is rapidly changing. APRI Armenia oversees the regular review of our AI protocols, conducts staff training, and ensures its ethics keep pace with technological advancements.

segments.B_label: purpose/rationale (why a guideline)/document status
segments.text: APRI Armenia remains committed to modeling responsible digital citizenship, ensuring that while tools are modern, its values remain rooted in rigorous, human-centered scholarship.

projection.text:
# APRI Armenia
# Source: https://apri.institute/statement-on-ethical-genai-use/
# Date: 2026-03-13
# Category: guideline

March 13, 2026

As digital transformation accelerates, APRI Armenia views Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) as a tool to enhance productivity and research depth while remaining steadfast in its commitment to critical thinking, accuracy, and intellectual integrity.
This statement outlines the principles that govern how APRI Armenia integrates GenAI into its research, communications, and daily operations.
1. Core Principles
APRI Armenia’s approach is guided by the ALLEA European Code of Conduct for Research Integrity and is centered on four pillars:
projection.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use

projection.text: General rule:
APRI Armenia forbids extensive or significant usage of GenAI in its external outreach, communication or research outputs.
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: Human Agency & Oversight:
projection.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use

projection.text: GenAI is a collaborator, not a researcher or designated communicator. Every piece of work published by APRI Armenia is the result of human critical thinking, analysis, and final decision-making.
Transparency:
projection.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use

projection.text: APRI Armenia believes in honest communication. In limited cases, when GenAI is used to shape the research process, external communication or drafting of a public output, APRI Armenia provides appropriate disclosure to its readers.
Data Sovereignty & Privacy:
projection.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use

projection.text: APRI Armenia does not input confidential information, unpublished research, or private donor information into public GenAI models.
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: Contextual Integrity:
projection.B_label: principles/values underlying document or AI use

projection.text: APRI Armenia’s strength lies in its deep understanding of Armenia and the region. APRI Armenia guards against “AI-heavy” writing that lacks local nuance, ensuring well-grounded and fact-based analysis and insights.
2. Professional Standards
APRI Armenia may utilize GenAI to augment their capabilities, specifically for:
projection.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI

projection.text: - Synthesizing vast amounts of public information and emerging trends.
projection.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI

projection.text: - Brainstorming diverse hypotheses and assumptions.
projection.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI

projection.text: - Improving the clarity and accessibility of complex documents.
projection.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI

projection.text: - Automating administrative and organizational workflows.
projection.B_label: permitted or encouraged uses of AI

projection.text: APRI Armenia does not permit:
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: - The use of AI-generated content as a substitute for original communication, research or expert analysis.
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: - The inclusion of AI-generated citations or data without independent human verification.
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: - The attribution of authorship to GenAI; responsibility for all work lies solely with the named human authors.
projection.B_label: restricted or prohibited uses of AI

projection.text: 3. Disclosures & Accountability
Transparency is essential to maintaining trust. APRI Armenia adopts a tiered approach to disclosure:
Full Disclosure:
If a report, online publication, or printed document has been assisted by GenAI, a clear statement will be included (e.g., in the methodology, footnotes, or article preamble).
Internal Assistance:
Minor uses, such as grammar correction or translation of public news articles, are considered part of standard professional tools and do not require external disclosure.
4. Continuous Evolution

The landscape of Artificial Intelligence is rapidly changing. APRI Armenia oversees the regular review of our AI protocols, conducts staff training, and ensures its ethics keep pace with technological advancements.
APRI Armenia remains committed to modeling responsible digital citizenship, ensuring that while tools are modern, its values remain rooted in rigorous, human-centered scholarship.

Last Updated: March 13, 2026

For inquiries regarding our digital policies, contact us at [email protected].
